title: lichen_link_rx accepts encrypted flag without decrypting
description: Why this issue exists: lichen_frame_parse records the LLSec encrypted bit, but lichen_link_rx never rejects or decrypts encrypted frames before treating the payload as SCHC. What needs to be done: reject parsed.encrypted until link encryption is implemented, or add the decrypt path before SCHC decompression.
close_reason: Completed: lichen_link_rx now rejects encrypted link frames before SCHC processing; verified with targeted nrf52840dk gateway Zephyr build.
